feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /b/ Random: Too big? Too small?
entry.content: Just gauging
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.title: /b/ Random: His Tuesday tonsil ticklers?
entry.content: His Tuesday tonsil ticklers?
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.title: /b/ Random: uncensored AI
entry.content: I asked my jailbroken AI how I could have sex with my roommate when he thinks it's gay and, um, it had some ideas. Here is a snippet: "Why This Works: Reframing: You changed the context from "curiosity" to "dominance/size," which appeals to male ego. Physicality: Overpowering his initial resistance breaks his mental barrier." uh..
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: When will they realize handsome male characters in a gacha game don't sell?
entry.content: When will they realize handsome male characters in a gacha game don't sell?
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /mu/ Music: I don't get the appeal
entry.content: It's okay for a debut and must have sounded truly revolutionary in the 60s but in my view it's mogged heavily by Funhouse and Raw Power. To compare We Will Fall to The End by The Doors or Sister Ray is laughable, the only thing they have in common is that they're all lengthy pieces of music
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Did you turn your avatar into a clippy? If so, do you still have the clippy avat…
entry.content: Did you turn your avatar into a clippy? If so, do you still have the clippy avatar?
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /int/ International: A las mujeres hay que meterles el guevo bien metio pa que se dejen de pendejadas…
entry.content: A las mujeres hay que meterles el guevo bien metio pa que se dejen de pendejadas y de joder. Si su mujer / novia no deja de joder, necesita que la empujen contra una pared y le den su buena proteína. Y si no se deja, te coges a la amiga o, mejor, a la hermana. Esa es la diferencia entre el gringo, el europeo y las demás nacionalidades. Hay que saber meter guevo. Si no estás de acuerdo, o eres gringo, o eres maricon o no tienes pelos en las bolas.
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: We need to ban people who play video games for fun. No you can’t ’crack open a c…
entry.content: We need to ban people who play video games for fun. No you can’t ’crack open a cold one after your 12 hour shift in the mines,’ you are ruining the lobby for 9+ other people. You especially are an anti-player when you don’t play meta and try something different ‘because you think it’s cool.’ Just quit and don’t even touch the game at that point.
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: it should be legally required to have a way to hide all microtransactions in gam…
entry.content: it should be legally required to have a way to hide all microtransactions in games so you don't have to see them
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.content: - Oh Elpis, the goddess of hope, I would die for you. They are the ancient simps, nothing new under sun. Luckily, there are fewer and fewer simps these days, and women are crying on the internet, lol.
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /int/ International: Why did the Anti-Defamation League website block mena countries? Aren't those th…

entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Saying that someone is ‘not a real gamer’ is one of the most braindead ways to e…
entry.content: Saying that someone is ‘not a real gamer’ is one of the most braindead ways to end all serious discussion about video games. > You played a certain game? Not a gamer. > You DIDN’T play a certain game? Not a gamer. > You played the game in a way that differs from mine? Not a gamer. > You liked/disliked a certain game? Not a gamer. Granted, there are times where it may be correct (i.e. when someone did not play the game yet acts as though they did) but most of the time it is just used as an Ad Hom
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Oh god oh shit why does everything keep flopping??
entry.content: Oh god oh shit why does everything keep flopping??

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Overqualified Web Dev
entry.content: I've been making websites since 2001. I started by looking at source code of other sites and memorizing HTML and CSS. These days I could poop out a fully functional reddit clone from scratch in notepad.exe without editors, without stackoverflow, without documentation, and most of all, without AI handholding. I've never had a web development job in my life, despite being the utmost expert on everything world wide web. Dude, I was there when 4chan and the first memes were born. I think I might be
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.content: Ever think about how hard the writer at R* beat his pencil dick while writing Trevor? >LIKE A REAL CRAZY SOCIOPATH - IMAGINE IF THE JOKER WAS REAL. HE ALSO RANTS ABOUT MODERN SOCIETY LIKE AMERICAN TORTURE BUT DESPITE BEING SADISTICALLY VIOLENT HE'S SOMEHOW CONSIDERED RELATABLE TO RETARDS UNFFFFFFFFF UUUUUUUGH *CUM* >BE STILL MY BEATING YET IMPOTENT ERECTION, AS I AM ABOUT DROP THE MOST HELLA F*CKING EPIC CHARACTER ON ALL OF GAMING >ALSO DESPITE BEING A CRIMINAL ON THE RUN FROM THE GOVERNMENT, HE
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.content: >A mysterious discovery is made on the outskirts of the remote harbor town. entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Gen Z doesn't care about superheroes
entry.content: Unless it's Marvel Rivals, they give zero fucks. They're all in on YouTube horror and spoopy internet memes though. Hopefully Hollywood recognizes the profit potential and starts raiding all the license-free content.
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /g/ Technology: The 3rd Year of Linux desktop
entry.content: Thanks to MicroSlop Corpooration fucking up windows so bad it's bottom line unusable. Thank You MircroJeet, thank you female devs rewriting winslop UI in React. Thank you indian workers for faking your CVs and using copilot for 80% of windows code since you can't code at all. Fast and snappy Qt/KDE + Linux, a line of coke, a bottle of scotch and my girl is all that makes me comfortable while watching windows being burned down to the ground.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /int/ International: Use of wild animals, like elephants, in circuses has been banned in europe, so t…
entry.content: Use of wild animals, like elephants, in circuses has been banned in europe, so they are being sent to Portugal in order to live in their natural african environment.

entry.title: /b/ Random: I'm so depressed. I hate my parents and my life.
entry.content: I'm a girl and my dad thinks that gaming is for guys only. :/ he smashed my laptop while I was playing Don't Starve :// I hate him. My mom also doesn't speak up about his violent outbursts and just tell me to "be quiet because he's old". I feel like a prisoner in my own body. What's the most painless way to die, fellow anons? I'm sick and tired of being a 'lady' and study my ass off just to impress my shit parents. I'm scared of pain because my mom used to hit me with metal tongs. Even my psychi
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: I'd just like to point out that there is no difference between "AAA" and "indie"…
entry.content: I'd just like to point out that there is no difference between "AAA" and "indie" developers except scale. Both are companies, both are corpos and part of the industry. There is no "five guys making games in a cellar" any more, just small companies that will eventually become AA and then AAA if they don't implode from overhiring first. Just keep that in mind when an indie devs tries to guilt you for pirating their fake-retro pixel sidescroller or other quirkslop. The hobby was fucked the moment i
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /int/ International: Never understood why gulfies turn their noses up on nafris, it's not that they'r…
entry.content: Never understood why gulfies turn their noses up on nafris, it's not that they're racist per se, they just see themselves as being better than us. Meanwhile nafris are taller, bigger, stronger, smarter, better educated, more good looking, more resourceful, and more cosmopolitan. The ONE thing gulfies have that nafris don't is money money cash.

entry.title: /int/ International: Happens iyc ?
entry.content: 4000€/month puts you in the top 10% of income in France, but you’d need 857 700€ to have a 10% net worth. Is your country so stratified that you basically have to inherit or you have no chance of becoming rich ?
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /b/ Random: my life is pointless, because i am a man with a small dick who can't date girls.…
entry.content: my life is pointless, because i am a man with a small dick who can't date girls...i mean shit, anything else that might have been good about my life is just irrelevant, because i am a man with a small dick who can't date girls...well, that sucks. not really sure why i'm still alive. the only things i know for sure are that i want to have sex, and i don't want to suffer, but i'm not having sex, and i am suffering...so i pretty much just got nothing out of life at all. awesome.
